metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_46
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Impairment of synaptic vesicle recycling was detected by measuring FM4-64FX uptake in neurons transfected with mutant but not wild type forms of Rab27b.

Literal excerpt: "Interestingly, we found that both GTP- and GDP-preferring Rab27b mutants profoundly impair stimulus-dependent recycling of SVs. Similar effects have been observed using functionally equivalent mutants of other Rab GTPases, including the closely related Rab3 proteins (Schlüter et al., 2002; Star et al., 2005).". Experimental description: Sequencing of cDNA encoded by plasmid. Not mentioned in the paper.

19/01/2017 Pim
Note: please note that the expert that created this annotation is part of the lab that created this publication. The species information is therefore derived from direct communication with the authors.

2/3/2017 Pim
The functional studies in Fig.7 use a OE protein. Author reports a rat species for this copnstruct.
